name: chuks_numpy
description: NumPy for Chuks — Rust cdylib shim around ndarray + ndarray-linalg providing n-dimensional float64/int64 arrays, broadcasting, slicing, fancy indexing, elementwise + reduction kernels, BLAS-backed linear algebra (matmul, dot, solve, inv, svd, eig, qr, cholesky), FFT, and ternary ops (where/select/masked-assign) via the typed-FFI PPP_I fast path. Phases NU1–NU5 of the chuks_numpy roadmap.
author: Chuks Team
